Release notes for Pebble firmware 3.12 with new features, bug fixes, and performance improvements.

# Purpose
The content describes features and improvements for Pebble Health on the mobile app. It highlights the availability of Pebble Health graphs, automatic detection of runs and long walks, Smart Alarms, and new activity insights for Time-series watches. It also mentions bug fixes and performance improvements for all models, with additional information available at `blog.pebble.com`.
